issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment, configuration, or data processing steps.

scenarios.name: Deploy TaxHacker on a Hetzner VPS
scenarios.rationale: Baseline offered generic Dockerized OCR advice without TaxHacker-specific commands, while treatment curled the vas3k/TaxHacker docker-compose.yml, ran docker compose up -d, set AI_PROVIDER/AI_MODEL/OPENAI_API_KEY/SECRET_KEY, and exposed port 8000 via Caddy.

scenarios.name: Configure German-freelancer deductibility field
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tried generic prompt engineering without knowledge of TaxHacker's custom field mechanism, whereas treatment configured a custom AI extraction field with the Yes (100%) / Partial / No prompt scoped to a freelance German software developer.
